Membership
HIF Pass
EVERYTHING.
ONE PRICE.
Full access to the app, every template pack, community, and new drops as they come out. Stop buying gear. Start buying systems.
Pricing TBD at launch
Membership Includes
  • Full app access — all 100+ production tools, no paywalls
  • Every template pack — current and future drops included
  • Member community — filmmakers sharing real work and real feedback
  • Early access — new tools ship to members first
  • Monthly resource drops — curated field reports, workflows, and guides
